top_signals.title: Smarsh Introduces New Anthropic Integration to Capture and Govern Claude Enterprise Data Within Its Platform
top_signals.summary: New integration brings generative AI interactions into full compliance visibility—allowing Smarsh to supervise and detect risk within existing workflows
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
